caption: A screen recording displays a web browser showing an online collaborative whiteboard and a video call window. The whiteboard features a black background with several light-colored circles containing portraits of people. In the center, a network of lines connects a person's profile picture to a group of items, including an orange icon and a graphic of a shopping cart with the word "SALE" written on it. Below this is a purple lightbulb icon. A small circular profile picture of a person with glasses is positioned near the center. In the top right corner, a video feed shows a man with short gray hair and glasses wearing a dark shirt. The browser tabs at the top include titles such as "Trust & Learning by Systemeni," "Future of Society by Systemeni," and "Rural Community Food System." The scene remains largely static across the frames, with only minor shifts in the man's expression and posture in the video feed.
